analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**1. Best CSP:**
TSLA $340 strike, 2026-05-29 expiry, 31 DTE, $7.50/$7.60 bid/ask, 0.26 delta, 26.1% annualized return

**2. Best CC:**
AMZN $275 strike, 2026-06-18 expiry, 51 DTE, $9.55/$9.70 bid/ask, 0.39 delta, 26.4% annualized return (existing position)

**3. Best LEAPS:**
None qualify - all showing elevated IVP (47-90%) and poor timing signals due to expensive premiums or unfavorable trend positioning

**4. Best Bull Call Spread:**
None available

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across the board (34-90% IVP) - excellent for premium selling but poor timing for LEAPS purchases. Market showing mixed signals with some names extended above MA50 while others forming potential bases.
